zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln於1292年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh26歲，母親Margaret Maud de Badlesmere26歲。他和Burghersh Lincoln至少有2個兒子。他於1334年被列為treasurer of england。他去世於1340年12月4日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln于1292年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh26岁，母亲Margaret Maud de Badlesmere26岁。他和Burghersh Lincoln至少有2个儿子。他于1334年被列为treasurer of england。他去世于1340年12月4日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Lincoln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linkins
meanings: English: variant of Linkin, which itself is a form of Lincoln , prevalent in Kent.

variants.name: Lindsay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Bishop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English bissop, biscop, Old English bisc(e)op ‘bishop’, which comes via Latin from Greek episkopos ‘overseer’. The Greek word was adopted early in the Christian era as a title for an overseer of a local community of Christians, and has yielded cognates in every European language: French évêque, Italian vescovo, Spanish obispo, Russian yepiskop, German Bischof, etc. The word came to be applied as a surname for a variety of reasons, among them a supposed resemblance in bearing or appearance to a bishop, and selection as the ‘boy bishop’ on Saint Nicholas's Feast Day. In some instances the surname is from the rare Middle English (Old English) personal name Biscop ‘bishop’. As an Irish surname it is adopted for Mac Giolla Easpaig, meaning ‘servant of the bishop’ (see Gillespie ). In North America, this surname has absorbed, by assimilation and translation, at least some of continental European cognates, e.g. German Bischoff , Polish, Rusyn, Czech, and Slovak Biskup , Slovenian Škof (see Skoff ).

variants.name: Bischoff
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Bernhard, Hans, Klaus, Lorenz, Alois, Armin, Arno, Dieter, Fritz.

German: from Middle High German bischof, Middle Low German bischop ‘bishop’, probably applied as a nickname for someone with a pompous manner or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop. See also Bishop .

variants.name: Bispo
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: nickname from bispo ‘bishop’ (see Bishop ).

variants.name: Gillespie
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Gille Easbaig ‘bishop's servant’. Gille Easbaig Cambeul was the founder of Clan Campbell.

variants.name: Episcopo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Orazio, Pasquale, Rocco.

Italian: from episcopo ‘bishop’ (from Latin episcopus (see Bishop ), probably a nickname for someone who had a pious manner or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop).

variants.name: Dean
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which has a double origin. In part it is a local name for someone who lived in a valley (Middle English dene, Old English denu) and in part an occupational name for someone who served as a dean, i.e. ecclesiastical supervisor (Latin decanus). The given name also sometimes represents Italian Dino (a short form of names such as Bernardino), as in the case of the American actor and singer Dean Martin ( 1917–95 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln was born in 1292, in Sussex, England, his father, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, was 26. He had at least 2 sons with Burghersh Lincoln. In 1334, his occupation is listed as treasurer of england. He died on 4 December 1340, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 48, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln est né en 1292, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Burghersh Lincoln. En 1334, sa profession de son indiquée est treasurer of england. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1340, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln 1292 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Maud de Badlesmere 26. Er hatte mit Burghersh Lincoln mindestens 2 Söhne. 1334 ist sein Beruf als treasurer of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1340 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln è nato il nel 1292 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Burghersh Lincoln. Nel 1334, la sua occupazione è indicata come treasurer of england. Morì il 4 dicembre 1340, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincolnが1292年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは26歳，母Margaret Maud de Badlesmereは26歳であった。彼はBurghersh Lincolnとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。1334年，職業はtreasurer of englandと記録されている。彼は1340年12月4日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln(이)가 1292년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Maud de Badlesmere(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Burghersh Lincoln(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1334년, 그의 직업은 treasurer of england이었다. 그는 1340년 12월 4일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln nasceu em 1292, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Burghersh Lincoln. Em 1334, sua profissão aparece como treasurer of england. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1340, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln родился в 1292 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Burghersh Lincoln. В 1334 году он работал по профессии treasurer of england. Он умер 4 декабря 1340 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Burghersh Bishop Lincoln nació en 1292, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Maud de Badlesmere, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Burghersh Lincoln. En 1334, su ocupación registrada era treasurer of england. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1340, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
